heroHeadline: Urumqi Non-Escalation Holds; Second Round of China-Mediated Talks Scheduled for End of April
heroSubtitle: Afghanistan and Pakistan committed to non-escalation after Urumqi talks conclude (Apr 9). Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks in Islamabad Apr 11-12, testing its dual mediator role. Next Af-Pak round due end of April.
footerNote: Data sourced from UNAMA, SIGAR, ACLED, Brown University Costs of War Project, US DoD, Reuters, BBC, Tolo News, Dawn, Al Jazeera, HRW, OHCHR
